packages.name: 4 Days - Northern Frontier Safari From Nairobi
packages.imageAlt: 4 Days - Northern Frontier Safari From Nairobi
packages.blurb: Compare 2026-2027 Northern Frontier (Namunyak & Matthews Mountain Forest) safari camp & lodge prices and holiday packages for Kenya. View trip prices, honeymoon tour booking, family safari vacation, solo travel packages, holidays reviews, trip videos, hotel photos & travel maps.
highlights: Northern Frontier - Visit this unique, vast, pristine wilderness expanse in northern Kenya. The landscape, flora, fauna, archaeological sites and small villages contribute to an unsurpassed, authentic travels in the wildest of Africa. The terrain varies from red deserts along the northern border to lush highlands in the south. Although the terrain can be inhospitable, you will not find a more strikingly beautiful setting of contrasting geological features

Namunyak Wildlife Conservancy - Surrounded by the Matthews Mountain and home to the Samburu tribe, Namunyak offers an authentic outback frontier wilderness in northern Kenya. It untouched ecology hosts herbivores such as reticulated giraffe, elephant, Grevy's zebra, kudu, alongside carnivores like leopard, lion, wild dog and over 200 birds species. Activities include bush walks, game drives, visit to the Reteti Elephant Sanctuary and authentic cultural interactions with the Samburu tribe

Matthews Mountain Range Forest - An untouched, wild biological bonanza of 900 square kilometers of lush mountain forest. The primary experience here is forest walks and hikes where elephants forge trails amongst cycads and hardwood trees where endangered monkeys thrive under the rainforest cover. The mountain valleys are home to predators such as wild dog, leopard and lion and herbivores like giant forest hog, buffalo, waterbuck, kudu and more. Swim in rock pools and culturally visit the singing wells of the Samburu tribe

highlights: Arusha - Experience views of Mount Meru, access to Arusha Park for game viewing and Momella Lakes canoeing, cultural, coffee farm tour, community and schools visits
Tarangire - Experience its renowned migratory elephant herds, diverse wildlife, 550 bird species, gigantic and ancient baobab trees (+1000 years)

Ngorongoro Crater & Lake Manyara - Experience UNESCO World Heritage Ecology, crater floor Big 5 game viewing, crater hikes, Olduvai Gorge archaeological site visit, Maasai and Hadzabe bushmen cultural encounters in Eyasi. Extend out to the scenic Great Rift Valley soda lake of Manyara with seasonal flamingos, picturesque landscape, diverse ecology - flora and fauna including tree-climbing lions, hippos and a primate hotspot - baboons and vervet monkeys
Serengeti - All year round large predator population, superb Big 5 game viewing, birdwatching and balloon safari
